mapper.select: SELECT C.ID, C.COUNT_NO, C.WH_CD, W.CD_NM_KO AS WH_NM, TO_CHAR(C.COUNT_YMD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS COUNT_YMD, C.STS, S.CD_NM_KO AS STS_NM, C.REG_ID FROM ST_COUNT C LEFT JOIN CM_CODE W ON W.GRP_CD='WH' AND W.CD=C.WH_CD AND W.DEL_YN='N' LEFT JOIN CM_CODE S ON S.GRP_CD='INV_STS' AND S.CD=C.STS AND S.DEL_YN='N' WHERE C.DEL_YN='N' AND C.COUNT_NO LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%' AND C.STS=#{sts} ORDER BY C.ID DESC

SELECT C.ID, C.COMP_CD, C.COUNT_NO, C.WH_CD, W.CD_NM_KO AS WH_NM, TO_CHAR(C.COUNT_YMD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS COUNT_YMD, C.STS, S.CD_NM_KO AS STS_NM, C.REMARK, C.REG_ID FROM ST_COUNT C LEFT JOIN CM_CODE W ON W.GRP_CD='WH' AND W.CD=C.WH_CD AND W.DEL_YN='N' LEFT JOIN CM_CODE S ON S.GRP_CD='INV_STS' AND S.CD=C.STS AND S.DEL_YN='N' WHERE C.ID=#{id} AND C.DEL_YN='N'
SELECT ID, COUNT_ID, LINE_NO, ITEM_CD, ITEM_NM, LOT_NO, UNIT_CD, BOOK_QTY, REAL_QTY, DIFF_QTY, REMARK FROM ST_COUNT_ITEM WHERE COUNT_ID=#{countId} ORDER BY LINE_NO
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ST_COUNT (COMP_CD, COUNT_NO, WH_CD, COUNT_YMD, STS, REMARK, REG_ID, MOD_ID) VALUES (#{compCd}, #{countNo}, #{whCd}, TO_DATE(#{countYmd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'TMP', #{remark}, #{regId}, #{regId})
mapper.update: UPDATE ST_COUNT SET WH_CD=#{whCd}, COUNT_YMD=TO_DATE(#{countYmd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), REMARK=#{remark}, MOD_ID=#{modId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
UPDATE ST_COUNT SET STS=#{sts}, MOD_ID=#{modId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ST_COUNT_ITEM (COUNT_ID, LINE_NO, ITEM_CD, ITEM_NM, LOT_NO, UNIT_CD, BOOK_QTY, REAL_QTY, DIFF_QTY, REMARK, REG_ID) VALUES (#{countId}, #{lineNo}, #{itemCd}, #{itemNm}, #{lotNo}, #{unitCd}, NVL(#{bookQty},0), NVL(#{realQty},0), NVL(#{diffQty},0), #{remark}, 'SYSTEM')
